title: Css Domino Builder
description: An interactive, blueprint-styled architecture sandbox workspace built to run mechanical physics and multi-directional cascade simulations. Users instantiate custom domino configurations on an indexed matrix grid container specifying orientation and vectors. Triggering the chain activates an array-backed proximity crawler engine that calculates adjacent grid steps and schedules fluid, multi-directional kinetic animations via class injection loops and 3D hardware-accelerated CSS perspective matrices.
